text:
received 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan 
Management System (HPMS). 

For 2013–2015, this field is only populated if the variable CMR_RECEIVED_NUM is greater than 4. 
There are fields for five CMR dates, see variables (CMR_RECEIVED_DT1–CMR_RECEIVED_DT5). Note 
that for 2016–2018 there are only two CMR_RECEIVED_DT fields; this field is not available.
